text:
In a sleepy little town nestled amongst pine trees lived Oliver Owl. Oliver Owlishowl loved trees. Every day he would patrol high branches searching squirrel thieves.

One autumn afternoon Oliver swooped down. Surely somewhere dark squirrels lurked. Nope. Just Susie.

Susie loved nutty things. Especially macadamiosis.

Her stash.

Oliver frowned. That couldn't be right.

After dark?

That wouldn't do.

Oliver prowled tirelessly.

Then moonlight.

Suspie?!

It couldn't be.

Just Suspie?

Oh sure.

Oliver owl flew away.

But later.

Suspie stole licorice.

Oliver Owlcraft breathed quietly.

That's just crazy owl stuff.


Just an owl.


Just Suspie.


Just stealing carrots.



Just orange!


Just licorice.




Just sweets.


JustSuspie.


JustOliver.


Just.



Just.


Just.





That.

So Oliver owl thought.



Just.



Just.



Just.



Just.



So owl quiet.

Just went
